title: Mother In Dubai ICU, Rs 1.25 Crore Bill: Indian Man Pleads For Help Amid War
summary_full: Thilakkumar Jalathu Aniruthraraj and his wife, Shaamini Ramesh, moved to Dubai eight years ago.
